json_ld.name: Free Online English Class (Choose Your Own Class)
json_ld.description:
Sign up for Online English classes with English for Asia. Improve your English. Build confidence in speaking! We offer regular English lessons at a very affordable price (FREE!).

Select your classes here: https://englishforasia.zoom.us/ze/hub/TESOL/events

Lessons include speaking, listening, reading, writing, grammar and pronunciation. All lessons are taught by trainee teachers who are observed by master teacher trainers from Trinity College London.

Classes are for people aged 18 years old and above (IST / Mondays to Saturdays).

For the best experience, attendees should have:

* a computer or ipad style device (no phones please)
* stable internet access
* a headset with microphone
* a webcam

All online lessons are free!

By joining the class you agree:
1\. not to record the lesson
2\. not to use offensive language
3\. not to display obscene material
4\. not to share phishing links

Please call or WhatsApp +85297232290 if you have any questions or connection issues.

json_ld.name: AI Agents for DevOps, Security + S3 file storage
json_ld.description:
Cloud is evolving fast and now AI is taking it to the next level!
Join us for an exciting meetup where we explore how AI-powered agents can automate DevOps, strengthen security, and manage scalable storage using Amazon Web Services.
In this session, we’ll break down:
⚙️ **DevOps Agent:** Automate deployments, monitor pipelines, and handle failures intelligently making your workflow faster and smarter.
🔐 **Security Agent:** Detect threats, analyze behavior, and enforce security policies in real-time to keep your cloud environment safe.
🗂️ **Smart Storage with S3:** Learn how Amazon S3 helps in storing logs, backups, and application data securely and at scale.

💡 Whether you're a beginner or already exploring cloud, this meetup will give you practical insights into building intelligent, automated cloud systems.

**🎯 Who should attend?**

* Students & beginners in cloud
* DevOps & cybersecurity enthusiasts
* Anyone curious about AI in cloud

**✨ What you’ll gain:**

* Real-world understanding of AI agents in cloud
* Practical use-cases with AWS
* Ideas for projects, hackathons, and careers

address.streetAddress: Shilp Corporate Park, B 212, Rajpath Rangoli Rd, near Rajpath Club, Bodakdev, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380059, Ahmedabad

json_ld.name: Data, AI and FinOps Summit 2026
json_ld.description:
**Step Into the Future at the Data, AI & FinOps Summit 2026**
The Prama Tribe is back — bringing together builders, decision-makers, and practitioners for a high-impact day of learning, collaboration, and hands-on insights across Data, Cloud, AI, and Cloud Financial Management.

**"Check out the full event schedule in the image attached below! "**

**What’s in it for you?**

**Practical AI Application** — Real-world use cases covering Generative AI, LLMs, RAG, and Vector Databases with implementation frameworks you can use immediately.

**Build a Strong Data & Cloud Foundation** — Understand how the right data strategy and cloud architecture directly impact scalability, cost efficiency, and AI success.

**Learn from Industry Practitioners** — Gain actionable perspectives from experienced leaders and engineers who are solving real challenges across industries.

**Actionable Takeaways** — Walk away with frameworks, best practices, and ideas you can apply to your current work from day one.

**High-Quality Networking** — Connect with peers, innovators, and experts, and curated attendees to ensure meaningful connections and opportunities.

**Plus, a Little Fun Along the Way** — Participate in interactive sessions, engage in discussions, and stand a chance to win exciting prizes!

Last Summit Meetup Link: [Data, Cloud & AI Summit 2024](https://www.meetup.com/pramaservices/events/303495653/?utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=share-btn_savedevents_share_modal&utm_source=link&utm_version=v2&member_id=407883819)

Whether you're working in Data, Cloud, AI, FinOps or exploring the space, this is an event you won't want to miss! The Prama tribe invites you to join us for a full day of learning, networking, and fun.

json_ld.name: Stop Applying to Jobs Like It's 2010 - What actually works - Recruiter Advice
json_ld.description:
## Details

Most people are still applying to jobs the same way they did 10–15 years ago and it’s no longer working.
I’m a Tech Recruiter , and I’ve interviewed thousands of candidates and extended hundreds of offers. I can tell you firsthand: **the job market has completely changed.**
In today’s AI-driven economy, simply submitting applications is not enough.
In this session, I’ll break down:

* Why applying online is no longer the most effective strategy
* What recruiters actually look for today
* How to stand out in a competitive, AI-influenced job market
* The strategies top candidates use to get noticed and hired

This is not theory, this is **real recruiter insight** you can apply immediately.
You’ll also have the opportunity to ask questions, connect with others, and start building a smarter approach to your career.

json_ld.name: AI Cafe : Ahmedabad Edition
json_ld.description:
**How to Join**

You can register for this meetup on the eChai event page: [https://echai.ventures/events/ai-cafe-ahmedabad-edition-may-08-2026](https://echai.ventures/events/ai-cafe-ahmedabad-edition-may-08-2026)

You’ll also find the list of featured participants and more details about the format there.

These meetups are open to anyone interested in startups, whether you're building, contributing, or exploring. Check the agenda and audience, and join if it feels relevant to you.

...

**Agenda:**

eChai Ventures and Upsquare are launching AI Actions Lab, a joint initiative to help founders, businesses, industries, professionals, and institutions across India explore and adopt AI in their work.

As part of AI Actions Lab, we are hosting AI Cafe every Friday, 4 pm to 7 pm at House of Starts, Ahmedabad.

Chai and cookies on the house. Bring your laptop. Wi-Fi is sorted. Pull up a chair and get to work.

AI Cafe is the simplest version of what a lot of people are looking for. A place to show up, do your work, and be around others who are curious about AI or actively building with it.

You set your own agenda. Work on what matters to you. Good things happen when interesting people share a table.

The folks next to you might be shipping a product, learning a new tool, running experiments, or figuring out where AI fits into their business. Conversations happen naturally. You compare notes, swap tools, help each other debug something. Some of the best ideas come from these unplanned exchanges.

Towards the end, some folks showcase what they are working on. Quick demos, works in progress, early experiments. Completely optional, but always interesting.

If you are in Ahmedabad and looking to talk, meet, and find other people who are into AI, this is your spot.

Every Friday. Same time. Same place.

**Venue:** House of Starts Sindhu Bhavan Road, First floor, BLOCK-D, satyam corporate square, Bodakdev, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380059.

**Date & Time:** May 8th, Friday. 7 pm to 9 pm.

For any queries, you can reach out to Jatin Chaudhary, Co-Founder, eChai Ventures at jatin@eChai.Ventures.

...

**eChai Ventures - Your Startup’s Global Neighborhood.**

Startups grow faster when founders are plugged into the right conversations. That’s what eChai makes happen — connecting founders across cities, stages, and markets.

Visit: [eChai.Ventures](https://echai.ventures/)

address.streetAddress: Upsquare Technologies, 1st Floor, D Block, Satyam Corporate Square, Sindhubhavan Rd, behind Rajpath Rangoli Road, opp. Iconic 10, Ahmedabad

json_ld.name: AI Terrace Mixer : Ahmedabad Edition
json_ld.description:
**How to Join**

You can register for this meetup on the eChai event page: [https://echai.ventures/events/ai-terrace-mixer-ahmedabad-edition-may-08-2026](https://echai.ventures/events/ai-terrace-mixer-ahmedabad-edition-may-08-2026)

You’ll also find the list of featured participants and more details about the format there.

These meetups are open to anyone interested in startups, whether you're building, contributing, or exploring. Check the agenda and audience, and join if it feels relevant to you.

...

**Agenda:**

AI Terrace Mixer brings founders, operators and builders together for an evening of conversations about AI, set in an open terrace space that makes it easy to meet people one conversation at a time.

The room is a mix of founders building AI products, operators using AI across coding, product, marketing, sales and internal operations, and people exploring how AI fits into what they are building next. Conversations move between what tools people are trying, what workflows have genuinely improved speed or output, what they have dropped, and how they stay current as things keep changing.

The terrace setting keeps the energy relaxed. Small group chats, open exchanges and the kind of interactions that often lead to new ideas, hires or collaborations.

If you are experimenting with AI or already using it in your daily work, this is a space to compare notes, discover new tools and meet the people shaping the AI conversation locally.

**Venue:** House of Starts Sindhu Bhavan Road, First floor, BLOCK-D, satyam corporate square, Bodakdev, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380059.

**Date & Time:** May 8th, Friday. 7 pm to 9 pm.

json_ld.name: AI x Marketing Terrace Mixer : Ahmedabad Edition
json_ld.description:
**How to Join**

You can register for this meetup on the eChai event page: [https://echai.ventures/events/ai-x-marketing-terrace-mixer-ahmedabad-edition-may-09-2026](https://echai.ventures/events/ai-x-marketing-terrace-mixer-ahmedabad-edition-may-09-2026)

You’ll also find the list of featured participants and more details about the format there.

These meetups are open to anyone interested in startups, whether you're building, contributing, or exploring. Check the agenda and audience, and join if it feels relevant to you.

...

**Agenda:**

An informal hangout with folks working on AI and marketing.

Think of it like a cafe meetup where everyone around you is figuring out the same things you are. Marketers trying new tools, founders rethinking GTM, operators running content and campaigns in new ways. Agency teams testing what scales, in-house folks building internal workflows, solo operators stitching together their own stack.

Come by, grab a chai, and find your people. Share what's working, ask what others are using, compare notes on tools, prompts, and processes. Talk about the wins, the dead ends, the things you wish someone had told you six months ago. Pick up a few ideas to try this week.

Open format. Walk in, start a conversation, move around, stay as long as you like. No agenda, no pressure, just good company and useful conversations.

**Venue:** Digipple HQ, 1014, Shivalik Shilp, Iskcon Cross Rd, Sarkhej - Gandhinagar Hwy, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380015.
